name: Agent Studio - GitHub PR Security Review

nodes.name: GitHub PR Webhook
nodes.notes: Set in GitHub repo → Settings → Webhooks. Events: Pull requests

_readme.title: GitHub PR Security Review via Agent Studio
setup: 2. Create credential 'Agent Studio API Key' (httpHeaderAuth): Name=Authorization, Value=Bearer as_YOUR_KEY
3. Create credential 'GitHub Token' (httpHeaderAuth): Name=Authorization, Value=Bearer ghp_YOUR_TOKEN (needs repo scope)
5. GitHub repo → Settings → Webhooks → Add webhook → set URL, Content-Type=application/json, Events: Pull requests
